title: Preflop Opening Ranges (9-max)
body_markdown:
## Preflop Opening Ranges

Use these as a baseline and widen or tighten against opponent tendencies.

- UTG: 15%
- MP: 20%
- CO: 33%
- BTN: 45%
- SB: 55%

title: Character Mapping (6 player types)
body_markdown:
## The Six Player Types

- OMC: Old Man Coffee (tight-passive)
- PLF: Passive Loose Fish (calling station)
- Y2K: Y2K Tag (dated tight-aggressive)
- GTO: GTO Boy (balanced, over-complicates)
- DWM: Drunk Whale Maniac (loose-aggressive)
- STP: Smart Thinking Player (strong, adaptive)
